content: What are the delivery timelines for standard shipping?
Standard shipping arrives in 3 to 6 business days in metro cities. 5 to 9 business days for non-metro. Orders placed before 2 pm IST ship the same day.
Do you offer express shipping?
Yes. Express shipping is available in select pincodes. Delivery in 1 to 2 business days. At checkout. choose Express if shown.
Do you ship internationally?
Yes. We ship to 40+ countries. Duties are paid by customer unless stated at checkout. Estimated 7 to 14 business days.
How can I track my order?
Use the tracking link in your shipment email or go to My Orders with your phone number and OTP.
What is your return policy?
Hassle-free returns within 7 days of delivery for unused items with tags. Refund to original payment within 5 to 7 business days after quality check.
Can I exchange sizes?
Yes. 1 free size exchange within 7 days if stock is available. Otherwise process as return plus re-order.
Do you support Cash on Delivery?
COD available for orders up to ₹6,000 in eligible pincodes. Extra ₹49 COD fee applies.
What payment methods are accepted?
UPI. Debit or credit cards. Netbanking. Wallets. No-cost EMI on carts above ₹5,000 for select banks.
How do I apply a coupon?
Enter the coupon in the Apply Coupon field at cart. One coupon per order unless stated.
How do I find my size?
Open the Size Guide on the product page. Compare chest or waist in cm. If between sizes. choose the larger for comfort.
Is there a warranty?
Apparel has 30 days manufacturing defect warranty. Electronics. 1 year brand warranty. Keep invoice email.
Can I cancel my order?
Orders can be cancelled before dispatch. After dispatch. refuse delivery or create a return after delivery.
Can I change my address after ordering?
Address changes are possible before dispatch only. Contact support quickly with order id and correct address.
Item arrived damaged. what now?
Sorry about that. Share 3 photos of the outer box. inner packing. and product within 48 hours. We will arrange a free replacement or refund.
How do I get a GST invoice?
Enter GSTIN on checkout or reply to the order email with GSTIN within 24 hours. We will issue a GST invoice.
Do you offer bulk discounts?
Yes. For 25+ units per SKU. mail purchase@shop.com with details. Our team will quote within 1 business day.
How do I wash this product?
Refer to Care. Cold machine wash. gentle cycle. do not bleach. tumble dry low. iron inside out.
I was charged but order not created.
If charged but no order. the bank auto-reverses in 3 to 5 days. If not. contact support with payment ref.
Do you have a rewards program?
Yes. Earn 1 point per ₹100 spent. 100 points equals ₹50 off. Track in My Account.
How can I contact support?
Email support@shop.com or WhatsApp +91-90000-00000. Hours 10 am to 7 pm IST. Mon to Sat.

🧠 Career Spike Hub (CSH)

Career Spike Hub is a premium career coaching and future-skills training company founded by Shweta Gupta, an IT professional turned Career Coach with 14+ years of experience across global tech companies like Cisco, Huawei, Technia AB, and Tata Technologies.

The mission of CSH is to empower 100,000 IT professionals — especially mid-career professionals in tech — to future-proof their careers, achieve 2X income growth, and build multiple income streams by mastering AI Agents, career branding, and leadership skills.



 Mission & Vision

Mission: Help IT professionals break career stagnation and become future-ready by combining AI skills with strategic career coaching.

Vision: Build a global community of empowered professionals who are AI-smart, financially secure, and respected leaders in their industries.



 Key Outcomes for Learners

Learn to build and use AI Agents to automate workflows and save 5–10 hours weekly.

Key Outcomes for Learners

Learn to build and use AI Agents to automate workflows and save 5–10 hours weekly.

Achieve 2X salary growth by positioning yourself as an AI-ready professional.

Build career security & resilience against layoffs and uncertain job markets.

Discover how to start a side hustle or freelance consulting business with AI.

Master LinkedIn branding, ATS-friendly resumes, and interview prep with AI-powered strategies.

Gain the confidence to lead with future-proof skills and multiple income streams.



 Core Offerings

AI Agents Starter Bootcamp (L1)

Introduction to AI Agents (no coding required)

Hands-on automation for emails, reports, task management

Save 10+ hours per week

AI-Powered Career Accelerator (L2)

Resume, LinkedIn, and interview prep with AI

Build workflows that boost visibility at work

Transition into higher-paying roles or leadership tracks

AI Leadership & Monetization Mastermind (L3)

Resume, LinkedIn, and interview prep with AI

Build workflows that boost visibility at work

Transition into higher-paying roles or leadership tracks

AI Leadership & Monetization Mastermind (L3)

Advanced AI Agent building (LangChain, n8n, enterprise workflows)

Packaging skills into freelancing, consulting, or training offers

Build authority as an AI leader in your domain

Career Spike Hub Community Challenges

Gamified challenges, assignments, and hackathons

Peer learning, networking, and accountability support



 Target Audience

Mid-career IT professionals (3–13 years experience)

Women in tech roles (PLM, CRM, IT support, project/delivery management)

Software developers, testers, analysts, and product managers

Professionals aged 25–40 stuck in their careers or fearing layoffs

Global IT professionals seeking a salary hike, role switch, or side income



 Topics & Tools Taught

AI Agents with n8n, Zapier, Power Automate, LangChain

Global IT professionals seeking a salary hike, role switch, or side income



 Topics & Tools Taught

AI Agents with n8n, Zapier, Power Automate, LangChain

Prompt Engineering & AI Productivity Tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Relevance AI)

LinkedIn optimization & ATS resumes

Interview frameworks & salary negotiation

Career branding, influence building, and networking with AI



 Marketing & Brand Positioning

Brand Archetype: The Mentor (guiding professionals with clarity & tools)

Customer Archetype: The Explorer (professionals seeking growth & freedom)

Marketing Channels: LinkedIn, Instagram Reels, YouTube, WhatsApp Groups, Paid Ads

Known for Hinglish-friendly AI literacy + practical career transformation

Focused on outcome-driven workshops and bootcamps



 Support System

Weekly live Q&A sessions

Peer accountability & networking groups

LMS access for recorded sessions

AI-powered templates, checklists, and playbooks

Community challenges to drive results and engagement

 Credibility & Impact

11+ years corporate experience + 14+ years IT background

Trained 1,000+ professionals in career growth and branding

Delivered 100+ hours of AI & career coaching workshops

Author of LinkedIn Mastery for Professionals (bestseller)

Co-author of I Can Coach Vol.3 with Siddharth Rajsekar

Helped professionals achieve 100%–220% salary hikes in India & abroad

Growing LinkedIn & Instagram community of IT professionals
